requirement.description: When one or more door open indications are detected from the body controller, the gateway shall immediately transmit a consolidated door-open status indicating whether any vehicle door is open.

values.1: At least one vehicle door open

test_cases.test_objective: Verify GWS_Any_Door_Open is 0 when all vehicle doors are closed.
Verify GWS_Any_Door_Open is 1 when front-left door is open.
Verify GWS_Any_Door_Open is 1 when front-right door is open.
Verify GWS_Any_Door_Open is 1 when rear-left door is open.
Verify GWS_Any_Door_Open is 1 when rear-right door is open.
Verify GWS_Any_Door_Open remains 1 when multiple doors are open.
Verify hood or tailgate open does not set GWS_Any_Door_Open.
